falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's bearish bottom scenario, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces an unexpected rate cut of 50 basis points or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a drastic policy shift would indicate a fundamental change in market dynamics, disproving the current pattern's assumptions.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume falls below 20% of the 30-day average for 3 consecutive days within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volume would suggest lack of market participation, directly contradicting the blowoff score's implication of active price pressure.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
